pageIntro: Have a question, want to book us for an event, or just want to say hi? Reach out via the info below or connect with us on social media.
bookUsText: Do you have a company function, parade, event opening, charity event, or just looking to bring the supernatural fun to a party? Don't wait another minute and contact your Paranormal Professionals — Ghostbusters, Virginia.
serviceAreasText: Our friendly professional team is the only 501(c)(3) non-profit Ghostbusters charity group serving you in:
footnoteText: A full contact form is coming soon. For now, please email us directly or reach out on social media.
